objects.query: SELECT Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjRule WHERE Name LIKE 'BULLS-%' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 WHERE StockKeepingUnit LIKE 'BULLS-ST-%' ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeDefinition WHERE Code = 'BULLS-SEAT-SECTION' ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name, SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModel WHERE Name = 'Term Annual' AND SellingModelType = 'TermDefined' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Name, CurrencyIsoCode, ScheduleType FROM PriceAdjustmentSchedule WHERE ScheduleType = 'Attribute' ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjRule WHERE Name LIKE 'BULLS-%' ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeDefinitionId, BooleanValue, DateValue, DateTimeValue, DoubleValue, IntegerValue, Operator, ProductId, StringValue FROM AttributeAdjustmentCondition WHERE AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name LIKE 'BULLS-%' ORDER BY AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, AttributeAdjConditionsHash, AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeCount, CurrencyIsoCode, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType FROM AttributeBasedAdjustment WHERE AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name LIKE 'BULLS-%' ORDER BY AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC
